message.content:
I need to gather information for a deployment document for the "订阅文档更新通知" feature in collabspace-server. Please find:

1. Read the build.gradle file at D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server\build.gradle - get the version and build config
2. Read the MattermostProperties file to see the new bot config fields: D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server\src\main\java\com\yottastudios\ns\collabspace\shared\config\properties\MattermostProperties.java
3. Read the QueueConfig to see the new MQ declarations: D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server\src\main\java\com\yottastudios\ns\collabspace\shared\config\QueueConfig.java (just the subscription-related parts around lines 70-72 and 210-231)
4. Check if there's an application.yml or application-test.yml that might need new config entries: search for "xcollabspaceBotToken" or "mattermost" in yml files under src/main/resources/

Return all findings concisely.
